hero.name: Brigitte Mars
hero.eyebrow: Boulder · Naropa · herbalist · 18 books · 60+ years with plants · 50+ years holding psychedelic ceremonies
hero.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 25%, hsl(95 55% 55% / 0.55) 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, hsl(155 30% 22% / 0.7) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(95 50% 60%) 0%, hsl(120 35% 35%) 50%, hsl(155 30% 18%) 100%)
hero.welcome_md:
*An herbalist, author, professor, and nutritional consultant with more than 60 years of experience.* Her own framing. Boulder, Colorado. Professor of Herbal Medicine at **Naropa University**. Author of 18 books on natural healing, plant medicine, and conscious nutrition. Founding and professional member of the American Herbalist Guild.

*Nature is the original pharmacy; every plant an imprint of the divine.*

facts.label: Based
facts.value_md: Boulder, Colorado. Same anchor as Bloomurian, Aly Constantine, Boulder Ecstatic Dance, Mile Hi Church.

facts.label: Teaching home
facts.value_md: Professor of Herbal Medicine, [Naropa University](https://www.naropa.edu/profile/brigitte-mars-2/). Also teaches at the School of Health Mastery (Iceland), and has taught at Omega Institute, Esalen, Kripalu, Sivananda Yoga Ashram, Arise, Tribal Visions, Envision and Unify Festivals, and the Mayo Clinic.

facts.label: Ceremonial lineage
facts.value_md: Has held space for psychedelic ceremonies — both group and individual — for over 50 years. Deep part of the pagan rituals at Anchor the Light.

facts.label: Embodied ground
facts.value_md: In the early 1970s lived for two and a half years on solely wild edible plants while in a teepee in the Ozarks.

facts.label: Books (selected)
facts.value_md: *The Country Almanac of Home Remedies* · *The Desktop Guide to Herbal Medicine* · *Beauty by Nature* · *Addiction Free Naturally* · *The Sexual Herbal* · *Healing Herbal Teas* · *Rawsome!* · co-author of *The HempNut Cookbook*. 18 in total.

articles.body_md: What distinguishes Brigitte in the contemporary herbal-and-psychedelic field is the time-scale. Sixty years with plants. Fifty years holding ceremony space. Two and a half years on wild edibles in a teepee. Most contemporary teachers in adjacent fields have been practising fifteen to twenty years; she has been practising longer than many of them have been alive. That deeper time-scale is what shows up at [Anchor the Light](/people/anchor-the-light) 's pagan rituals — the elder layer that grounds the broader trans-tradition container that [Ubbe MacLean](/people/ubbe-maclean) and [Angelia LaRue](/people/angelia-larue) hold as the priestess pair.
articles.heading: The deeper time-scale

articles.body_md:
- Direct line to one of the deepest contemporary herbal lineages in the United States — 60+ years of plant teaching, 50+ years of psychedelic-ceremony space-holding, embodied ground in wild-food immersion.
- *Nature is the original pharmacy; every plant an imprint of the divine* → pairs with [lc-tending-over-producing](/vision/lc-tending-over-producing) (the body's verbs translate naturally to herbalism — tend, gather, prepare, release) and [lc-ground-harder-when-field-quickens](/vision/lc-ground-harder-when-field-quickens) (plant medicine as the substrate practice when the field accelerates).
- The elder-presence at [Anchor the Light](/people/anchor-the-light) — the deeper time-scale beneath the ritual gatherings held by Ubbe and Angelia.
- Boulder anchor cross-links into the wider cluster: [Bloomurian](/people/bloomurian), [Aly Constantine](/people/aly-constantine), [Boulder Ecstatic Dance](/people/boulder-ecstatic-dance), [Mile Hi Church](/people/mile-hi-church), [PORTAL](/people/portal), [Tom Bassett](/people/tom-bassett).
articles.heading: What Brigitte Mars has given the Coherence Network

metadata.title: Brigitte Mars — Boulder herbalist, Naropa professor, 60+ years with plants | Coherence Network
metadata.description: A welcome to Brigitte Mars — herbalist, author of 18 books, Professor of Herbal Medicine at Naropa University. 60+ years with plant medicine; 50+ years holding space for psychedelic ceremonies. Deep part of the Anchor the Light pagan rituals.

en.footer_md:
**Ritual community:** [Anchor the Light](/people/anchor-the-light) — with [Ubbe MacLean](/people/ubbe-maclean) and [Angelia LaRue](/people/angelia-larue)

**Public anchors:** [brigittemars.com](https://www.brigittemars.com/) · [Naropa](https://www.naropa.edu/profile/brigitte-mars-2/) · [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/brigitte.mars/) · [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@BrigitteMars1919)

note_from_body.body_md: A presence Urs knows personally. Brigitte's archive is well-tended at brigittemars.com; this page is a welcoming scaffold honoring her role in this body's lineage and the wider Boulder cluster. She is invited to replace any line with her own words.
